vi: Cu so het moi thu di, Murray.

en: Murr, just go look at the camera and go, Look, you can't even look straight, Murr. You can't even look back.
ja: 見て、まっすぐ見れないんだよ。
vi: Nhin kia, anh ay khong dam nhin thang.

en: Murr, just go look at the camera and go, ah, POV stuff.
ja: カメラを見て、あー、って。POV撮影だ。
zhTW: 看著鏡頭說：啊，第一人稱視角。
vi: Nhin vao camera va noi, a, goc nhin thu nhat.

ja: あー、ポイントオブビューカメラ。
vi: A, camera goc nhin chu quan.

en: Start waving at your ass like you farted while you're staring in the camera.
ja: カメラを見ながらお尻に手を振って。
zhTW: 一邊盯著鏡頭一邊對著你的屁股揮手。
vi: Vay tay o mong trong khi nhin vao camera.
